scripts.test:finance:concurrency:docker: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=55432 DB_NAME=construction_erp_finance_test DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=postgres FINANCE_DB_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true node --test tests/finance-concurrency.integration.test.js
scripts.db:finance:concurrency:wait: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=55432 DB_NAME=construction_erp_finance_test DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=postgres node src/scripts/waitForFinanceTestDb.js
scripts.db:finance:concurrency:init: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=55432 DB_NAME=construction_erp_finance_test DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=postgres node src/scripts/initFinanceTestDb.js
scripts.migrate:finance:concurrency: npm run db:finance:concurrency:init && DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=55432 DB_NAME=construction_erp_finance_test DB_USER=postgres DB_PASSWORD=postgres npm run migrate
scripts.verify:local: npm run test && npm run verify:app
scripts.verify:local:full: npm run verify:local && npm run verify:owner-lock
scripts.verify:go-live:local: DB_SSL=false NODE_ENV=production CORS_ORIGIN=https://erp.example.com EXPOSE_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN=false PASSWORD_RESET_DELIVERY_MODE=webhook PASSWORD_RESET_WEBHOOK_URL=https://reset-gateway.example.internal/webhook node src/scripts/verifyGoLiveReadiness.js
scripts.verify:practical: npm run verify:local && npm run test:finance:policy && npm run verify:go-live:local
